channel.title: Documentation on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on Zymacs

item.title: About
item.description:
I am a Computer Engineering graduate. I like to learn about Computers and make them do things.
On here, I share mostly technical knowledge from topics I’ve studied and every once in a while, opinionated rumblings on all sorts of topics that interest me. Probably you as well. To talk about anything related to what I post on here or whatever else, please don’t hesitate to reach out to me via email at zymacs@zmail.com or via BlueSky.
